news.title: Lumentum Stock Surges After Barclay’s Says It’s Time to Buy
news.summary: Lumentum Holdings  was among the hottest names in the artificial-intelligence trade at the start of the year.  After a couple rocky months, it is time to buy, according to Barclays.  The firm upgraded  Lumentum  shares to Overweight from Equal Weight and reiterated a price target of $1,000 in a research note Monday.

news.summary: Dave, V2X and Coherent are highlighted in Zacks' industry outlook as companies benefiting from favorable trends and sector-specific growth drivers.

news.title: IPG Photonics Targets Medical Laser Growth With €300M Lumibird Medical Deal
news.summary: IPG Photonics (NASDAQ:IPGP) said it has signed a binding offer with Lumibird SA to acquire Lumibird Medical, a medical laser systems business focused primarily on ophthalmology, in a transaction the company said would expand its exposure to higher-margin medical markets. news.title: 3 Stocks to Consider From the Growing Technology Services Market
news.summary: The Zacks Technology Services industry is growing rapidly, fueled by the swift adoption of remote work and other technological advancements, boosting revenues and cash flow since the pandemic. DAVE, VVX and COHR are expected to follow the growth momentum.

news.title: Who Is Positioned to Buy Universal Display?
news.summary: With a fortress balance sheet and a trove of essential patents, this overlooked display-tech leader has the clear markings of a takeover target.

news.title: Can You Stomach The Plunge In Applied Optoelectronics Stock?
news.summary: Its history of deep, prolonged drops in market shocks is the real risk to weigh against today's AI-fueled growth story.

news.title: Coherent (COHR) Stock May Be 11% Undervalued Despite Fresh AI Infrastructure News
news.summary: Coherent stock has delivered a very large 3 year return while valuation checks, including an intrinsic value estimate based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach and market multiples, both currently point to the shares trading at a discount of about 11.2% to that intrinsic value. news.title: Applied Optoelectronics Falls 12%, Coherent and Lumentum Slide as AI Optics Trade Cools
news.summary: The AI optics trade just handed back a chunk of its parabolic gains in a single afternoon, and the question now is whether the stocks leading this year's most crowded hardware rally are taking a breather or signaling something worse.

news.title: COHR's Post-Earnings Pullback Has Strengthened the Investment Case
news.summary: Coherent's post-earnings pullback has improved its risk-reward profile despite strong results, higher guidance and expanding AI infrastructure demand.

news.title: JPMorgan’s View on Coherent Corp. (COHR)
news.summary: Coherent Corp. (NYSE:COHR) is among the Best AI Stocks. On June 22, JPMorgan reiterated its Overweight rating after hosting meetings with Coherent Corp. (NYSE:COHR) management. The firm reported that the company described aggregate datacom pricing as healthy, with demand continuing to outpace supply and adoption cycles remaining compressed.
